label: Japan / Japanese
ladderNote: Everyday Japanese from Yahoo知恵袋, Zexy, Oggi, and 発言小町. Official dating usually starts with 告白 → 付き合う; 友達以上恋人未満 is the gray zone.

levels.meaning: There's interest / a chance — mutual or one-sided attraction signals.

levels.term: アプローチ / 好意を示す
levels.meaning: Making a move / showing romantic interest; not necessarily street pickup.

levels.term: 連絡を取り合う / LINEする
levels.meaning: Texting / staying in touch (often via LINE).
Going on dates — may still be before official 付き合う.
Sex friend / FWB. Standard Japanese slang; distinct from being 恋人.
More than friends, less than lovers — the classic Japanese situationship phrase.
Confession / asking to date. The cultural step that usually makes it official.

levels.term: 付き合う / 交際する / 彼氏・彼女
levels.meaning: Officially dating / boyfriend·girlfriend. These are the same practical relationship stage.
Partner; more adult / formal than 彼氏・彼女.
Living together. Often discussed as marriage-adjacent in Japanese media.
